chess.reason: Interactive board not rendered. StudyQuizOverlay HAS chess code (imported at line 7, branch at line 211) but chessContext is null because chess_tactics.json stores fenPosition as the post-setup-move puzzle position while getPlayerContext() expects the base FEN before setup move. chess.js throws on invalid move, catch block silently nullifies chessContext. Fix: correct fenPosition convention in chess_tactics.json.

map-pin.reason: SVG map not rendered. MapPinDrop.svelte is not imported into StudyQuizOverlay.svelte and there is no map_pin branch in the template (lines 210-252). Data pipeline correctly forwards mapCoordinates and quizResponseMode — the gap is the missing UI branch. Fix: add map_pin conditional branch to StudyQuizOverlay.

procedural.reason: Arithmetic questions generate and score correctly; minor UX: 0% accuracy shown too early

trivia.reason: TriviaRoundScreen.svelte orphan — never imported, no screen routing, no scenario preset

study.reason: FSRS session works with curated deck scenarios; legacy study-quiz requires pre-seeded player data

topFindings: Chess board: StudyQuizOverlay has the code but chess_tactics.json fenPosition convention is wrong (post-setup FEN stored, but pre-setup base FEN expected by getPlayerContext)
Map pin: MapPinDrop not wired into StudyQuizOverlay — missing UI branch, data pipeline is correct
TriviaRoundScreen.svelte is unreachable dead code — never imported, no routing, no scenario preset
Procedural Math (16 math decks) is production-ready but obscured behind 4-click navigation
codeVerificationNote: Initial report incorrectly stated StudyQuizOverlay had zero references to ChessBoard. Post-session source inspection corrected the chess root cause from 'missing UI code' to 'fenPosition data format mismatch'. Map-pin finding unchanged — genuinely not wired in study flow.
